sizing_rule.note: Position size = Account Size × f (optimal f parameter). Higher f values (0.24) maximize TWR but increase volatility and drawdown risk; lower f values (0.16) reduce variance. Demonstrated comparison table provided in source.

source_rule_text: Position size scales with the optimal f parameter, where higher f values (0.24) generate greater TWR but with increased volatility and drawdown risk compared to lower f values (0.16).
